1. 概述

1.1 NCCL协议体系

NCCL (NVIDIA Collective Communications Library) 实现了三种核心通信协议：

协议类型定义常量主要特点适用场景
LLNCCL_PROTO_LL低延迟、带标志位同步小消息、延迟敏感
LL128NCCL_PROTO_LL128128字节对齐、高带宽中等大小消息
SimpleNCCL_PROTO_SIMPLE简单高效、最高带宽大消息、带宽敏感

1.2 协议类模板定义

// 协议类作为模板参数传递
template<typename T, typename RedOp, typename Fan, int Direct, typename Proto, int P2p>
class Primitives;

// 三种协议类定义
struct ProtoLL {
  static constexpr int Id = NCCL_PROTO_LL;
  __device__ static int calcBytePerStep();
  __device__ static int calcBytePerGrain();
};

struct ProtoLL128 {
  static constexpr int Id = NCCL_PROTO_LL128;
  __device__ static int calcBytePerStep();
  __device__ static int calcBytePerGrain();
};

template<int SlicePerChunk, int StepPerSlice, int Unroll, int MultimemSrcs, int MultimemDsts>
struct ProtoSimple {
  static constexpr int Id = NCCL_PROTO_SIMPLE;
  __device__ static int calcBytePerStep();
  __device__ static int calcBytePerGrain();
};

1.3 协议文件组织

nccl/src/device/
├── primitives.h          # 协议接口定义
├── prims_ll.h           # LL协议实现 (406行)
├── prims_ll128.h        # LL128协议实现 (435行)
├── prims_simple.h       # Simple协议实现 (1147行)
└── op128.h              # 128位原子操作支持

2. 协议架构设计

2.1 协议核心常量

// 全局参数
#define NCCL_STEPS 8                    // 流水线步数
#define WARP_SIZE 32                    // Warp大小
#define NCCL_MAX_NTHREADS 640           // 最大线程数

// LL协议常量
#define NCCL_LL_MAX_NTHREADS 512        // LL最大线程数
#define NCCL_LL_LINES_PER_THREAD 8      // 每线程处理行数
#define NCCL_LL_CLEAN_MASK 0x7ffffff8   // 清理掩码
#define NCCL_LL_FLAG(a) ((uint32_t)(a)) // 标志位计算

// LL128协议常量
#define NCCL_LL128_LINESIZE 128                     // 行大小128字节
#define NCCL_LL128_LINEELEMS 16                     // 每行16个uint64_t
#define NCCL_LL128_DATAELEMS 15                     // 15个数据元素+1个标志
#define NCCL_LL128_MAX_NTHREADS 640                 // 最大线程数
#define NCCL_LL128_SHMEM_ELEMS_PER_THREAD 8         // 每线程共享内存元素数
#define NCCL_LL128_FLAGTHREAD (NCCL_LL128_LINEELEMS-1)  // 标志线程索引

2.2 通信缓冲区结构

流水线缓冲区设计 (NCCL_STEPS = 8):

+----------+----------+----------+-----+----------+
| Step 0   | Step 1   | Step 2   | ... | Step 7   |
+----------+----------+----------+-----+----------+
   ^                                        ^
   |                                        |
   recvStep (接收进度)                      sendStep (发送进度)
   
每个Step包含:
- LL: 16字节行 (8字节数据 + 8字节标志)
- LL128: 128字节行 (120字节数据 + 8字节标志)
- Simple: 可变大小数据块

2.3 同步机制

// 三种协议的同步方式对比

// LL: 标志位轮询
uint64_t readLL(int offset, int i) {
  uint32_t flag = recvFlag(i);
  do {
    asm volatile("ld.volatile.global.v4.u32 {%0,%1,%2,%3}, [%4];" 
        : "=r"(data1), "=r"(flag1), "=r"(data2), "=r"(flag2) 
        : "l"(&src->i4));
  } while ((flag1 != flag) || (flag2 != flag));  // 等待标志匹配
  return data;
}

// LL128: 标志线程机制
bool needReload = false;
do {
  for (int u=0; u<ELEMS_PER_THREAD; u+=2) {
    load128(ptr+u*WARP_SIZE, vr[u], vr[u+1]);
    needReload |= flagThread && (vr[u+1] != flag);  // 标志线程检查
  }
} while (__any_sync(WARP_MASK, needReload));

// Simple: Step计数器轮询
while (connStepCache + NCCL_STEPS < step + StepPerSlice) {
  connStepCache = loadStepValue(connStepPtr);  // 轮询步计数器
}

3. LL (Low Latency) 协议

3.1 核心设计理念

目标: 最小化延迟，适合小消息通信

关键特性:

  • 16字节数据行 = 8字节数据 + 8字节标志
  • 每个线程独立轮询标志位
  • 数据和标志原子性写入
  • 支持不对齐内存访问

3.2 数据格式

union ncclLLFifoLine {
  struct {
    uint32_t data1;    // 4字节数据1
    uint32_t flag1;    // 4字节标志1
    uint32_t data2;    // 4字节数据2
    uint32_t flag2;    // 4字节标志2
  };
  uint64_t v[2];       // 两个64位值
  int4 i4;             // 128位向量
};

// 内存布局 (16字节对齐):
// [data1:4B][flag1:4B][data2:4B][flag2:4B]
//  ↑                  ↑
//  8字节数据          8字节标志

3.3 读写操作实现

// LL读取操作 (volatile load)
__device__ uint64_t readLL(int offset, int i) {
  union ncclLLFifoLine* src = recvPtr(i) + offset;
  uint32_t flag = recvFlag(i);  // 期望的标志值
  uint32_t data1, flag1, data2, flag2;
  int spins = 0;
  
  // 自旋等待直到标志匹配
  do {
    // 原子读取16字节 (4个uint32_t)
    asm volatile("ld.volatile.global.v4.u32 {%0,%1,%2,%3}, [%4];" 
        : "=r"(data1), "=r"(flag1), "=r"(data2), "=r"(flag2) 
        : "l"(&src->i4) 
        : "memory");
    if (checkAbort(abort, 1, spins)) break;
  } while ((flag1 != flag) || (flag2 != flag));  // 双重标志验证
  
  uint64_t val64 = data1 + (((uint64_t)data2) << 32);
  return val64;
}

// LL写入操作 (volatile store)
__device__ void storeLL(union ncclLLFifoLine* dst, uint64_t val, uint32_t flag) {
  // 原子写入: 数据和标志同时更新
  asm volatile("st.volatile.global.v4.u32 [%0], {%1,%2,%3,%4};" 
      :: "l"(&dst->i4), 
         "r"((uint32_t)val),      // data1
         "r"(flag),                // flag1
         "r"((uint32_t)(val>>32)), // data2
         "r"(flag)                 // flag2
      : "memory");
}

3.4 流水线管理

// LL协议步进管理
__device__ void incSend(int i, int offset) {
  // LL清理机制: 定期清理旧标志
  if ((sendStep[i] & NCCL_LL_CLEAN_MASK) == NCCL_LL_CLEAN_MASK) {
    // 写入新标志到整个slice
    for (int o = offset; o<stepLines; o+=nthreads) {
      storeLL(sendPtr(i)+o, 0, sendFlag(i));
    }
  }
  sendStep[i]++;  // 步进增加
}

// 发送等待
__device__ void waitSend(int nbytes) {
  int spins = 0;
  // 等待接收方消费前一个步骤
  while (sendConnHeadCache + NCCL_STEPS < sendConnHead + 1) {
    sendConnHeadCache = *sendConnHeadPtr;
    if (checkAbort(abort, 1, spins)) break;
  }
  
  // 更新FIFO大小
  if (sendConnFifo) {
    int size = ((sendConnHead & NCCL_LL_CLEAN_MASK) == NCCL_LL_CLEAN_MASK) 
                ? stepLines*sizeof(union ncclLLFifoLine) 
                : nbytes;
    sendConnFifo[sendConnHead%NCCL_STEPS].size = size;
  }
  sendConnHead += 1;
}

3.5 数据加载器 (DataLoader)

// 支持不对齐内存访问的数据加载器
struct DataLoader {
  int misalign;
  union {
    uint32_t u4[3];     // 小类型使用
    uint64_t u8;        // 大类型使用
    T elt[EltPerLine];
  };

  __device__ void loadBegin(T *src, int eltN) {
    if (sizeof(T) <= 2) {
      // 处理不对齐访问
      misalign = reinterpret_cast<uintptr_t>(src) % 4;
      uint32_t *p = reinterpret_cast<uint32_t*>(
          reinterpret_cast<uintptr_t>(src) & -uintptr_t(4));
      u4[0] = load(p+0);
      u4[1] = misalign + eltN*sizeof(T) > 4 ? load(p+1) : 0;
      u4[2] = misalign + eltN*sizeof(T) > 8 ? load(p+2) : 0;
    } else {
      // 对齐访问
      for(int i=0; i < EltPerLine; i++) {
        if(i==0 || i < eltN) elt[i] = load(src + i);
      }
    }
  }

  __device__ uint64_t loadFinish() {
    if (sizeof(T) <= 2) {
      // 使用漏斗移位处理不对齐数据
      u4[0] = __funnelshift_r(u4[0], u4[1], 8*misalign);
      u4[1] = __funnelshift_r(u4[1], u4[2], 8*misalign);
    }
    return u8;
  }
};

3.6 通用操作模板

template <int RECV, int SEND, int SrcBuf, int DstBuf>
__device__ __forceinline__ void LLGenericOp(
    intptr_t srcIx, intptr_t dstIx, int nelem, bool postOp) {
  
  constexpr int SRC = SrcBuf != -1 ? 1 : 0;
  constexpr int DST = DstBuf != -1 ? 1 : 0;
  
  T *srcElts = SrcBuf == -1 ? nullptr : userBufs[SrcBuf] + srcIx;
  T *dstElts = DstBuf == -1 ? nullptr : userBufs[DstBuf] + dstIx;

  nelem = nelem < 0 ? 0 : nelem;
  if (SEND) waitSend(divUp(nelem, EltPerLine)*sizeof(ncclLLFifoLine));

  nelem -= tid*EltPerLine;
  srcElts += tid*EltPerLine;
  dstElts += tid*EltPerLine;
  int offset = tid;
  int eltPerTrip = nthreads*EltPerLine;
  
  while (nelem > 0) {
    int eltInLine = EltPerLine < nelem ? EltPerLine : nelem;

    DataLoader dl;
    ncclLLFifoLine line[MaxRecv];
    uint64_t data, peerData;
    
    // 加载源数据
    if (SRC) {
      dl.loadBegin(srcElts, eltInLine);
      srcElts += eltPerTrip;
    }
    
    // 接收对等数据
    if (RECV) {
      readLLBeginAll<1>(offset, line);
      peerData = readLL(offset, 0);
    }
    
    // 完成数据加载
    if (SRC) {
      data = dl.loadFinish();
      if (SrcBuf == Input) data = applyPreOp(redOp, data);
    }
    
    // 规约操作
    if (RECV) {
      data = !SRC ? peerData : applyReduce(redOp, peerData, data);
      for (int i=1; i < MaxRecv && i < fan.nrecv(); i++) {
        peerData = readLLFinish(offset, line, i);
        data = applyReduce(redOp, peerData, data);
      }
    }

    if (postOp) data = applyPostOp(redOp, data);

    // 发送结果
    if (SEND) {
      for (int i=1; i < MaxSend && i < fan.nsend(); i++)
        storeLL(sendPtr(i)+offset, data, sendFlag(i));
      storeLL(sendPtr(0)+offset, data, sendFlag(0));
    }
    
    // 存储到目标
    if (DST) {
      storeData(dstElts, data, eltInLine);
      dstElts += eltPerTrip;
    }
    
    nelem -= eltPerTrip;
    offset += nthreads;
  }

  // 更新步进
  if (RECV) {
    for (int i=0; i < MaxRecv; i++) incRecv(i);
    postRecv();
  }
  if (SEND) {
    for (int i=1; i < MaxSend && i < fan.nsend(); i++)
      incSend(i, offset);
    incSend(0, offset);
  }
}

3.7 性能特征

指标值说明
有效带宽50%8字节数据 + 8字节标志
延迟最低无需等待完整缓冲区
对齐要求无支持任意对齐
线程数≤512NCCL_LL_MAX_NTHREADS
最佳消息大小<256KB小消息

4. LL128协议

4.1 核心设计理念

目标: 平衡延迟和带宽，适合中等大小消息

关键特性:

  • 128字节对齐数据行 = 120字节数据 + 8字节标志
  • 标志线程(FlagThread)机制
  • Warp级并行操作
  • 共享内存优化

4.2 数据格式与标志线程

// 128字节行结构
// [data:15*8B][flag:1*8B] = [120B数据][8B标志]

#define NCCL_LL128_LINESIZE 128              // 总大小128字节
#define NCCL_LL128_LINEELEMS 16              // 16个uint64_t元素
#define NCCL_LL128_DATAELEMS 15              // 15个数据元素
#define NCCL_LL128_FLAGTHREAD 15             // 第15个元素是标志

// 标志线程: warp内每8个线程中的第7个线程 (tid%8==7)
bool flagThread = (tid%8)==7;

// Warp内数据分布:
// 线程0-6: 处理数据元素 (每线程2*8=16字节)
// 线程7:   处理标志+数据 (标志线程)

4.3 寄存器数据加载

template<int WordPerThread>
__device__ __forceinline__ void loadRegsBegin(
    uint64_t(&regs)[WordPerThread], T const *src, int eltN) {
  
  constexpr int EltPer16B = 16/sizeof(T);
  
  if(reinterpret_cast<uintptr_t>(src)%16 == 0) {
    // 16字节对齐: 直接加载到寄存器
    #pragma unroll
    for(int g=0; g < WordPerThread/2; g++) {
      int ix = g*WARP_SIZE - 4*(g/2) + wid - (g%2)*(wid/8);
      if(!flagThread || g%2==0) {
        if(ix*EltPer16B < eltN)
          load128((uint64_t*)(src + ix*EltPer16B), regs[2*g+0], regs[2*g+1]);
      }
    }
  } else {
    // 非对齐: 通过共享内存暂存
    int misalignment = reinterpret_cast<uintptr_t>(src) % 16;
    uint64_t *src8 = reinterpret_cast<uint64_t*>(
        reinterpret_cast<uintptr_t>(src) & -uintptr_t(16));
    uint64_t *shm8 = shmemCvtPtr((uint64_t*)ncclScratchForWarp(warpInBlock));
    
    // 加载到共享内存
    #pragma unroll
    for(int g=0; g < WordPerThread/2; g++)
      if((g*WARP_SIZE + wid)*16 < misalignment + eltN*sizeof(T))
        load128(src8 + 2*(g*WARP_SIZE + wid), regs[2*g+0], regs[2*g+1]);
    
    #pragma unroll
    for(int g=0; g < WordPerThread/2; g++)
      storeShmem128(shm8 + 2*(g*WARP_SIZE + wid), regs[2*g+0], regs[2*g+1]);

    __syncwarp();

    // 从共享内存加载到寄存器
    T *shm = (T*)shm8 + misalignment/sizeof(T);
    #pragma unroll
    for(int g=0; g < WordPerThread/2; g++) {
      int ix = g*WARP_SIZE - 4*(g/2) + wid - (g%2)*(wid/8);
      if(!flagThread || g%2==0) {
        if(ix*EltPer16B < eltN)
          loadShmemMisaligned128(shm + ix*EltPer16B, regs[2*g+0], regs[2*g+1]);
      }
    }
  }
}

// 完成寄存器加载: 将标志线程数据移到空闲寄存器
template<int WordPerThread>
__device__ __forceinline__ void loadRegsFinish(uint64_t(&regs)[WordPerThread]) {
  #pragma unroll
  for (int g=1; g < WordPerThread/2; g+=2) {
    if (flagThread) regs[2*g] = regs[2*g-1];  // 标志线程洗牌
  }
}

4.4 接收-规约-发送操作

template <int ELEMS_PER_THREAD, int RECV, int SEND, int SrcBuf, int DstBuf>
__device__ __forceinline__ void recvReduceSendCopy(
    uint64_t(&v)[ELEMS_PER_THREAD], int ll128Offset, bool postOp) {
  
  constexpr int SRC = SrcBuf != -1 ? 1 : 0;
  uint64_t vr[ELEMS_PER_THREAD];

  __syncwarp();
  
  /********** 等待第一个接收 **********/
  if (RECV) {
    uint64_t* ptr = recvPtr(0)+ll128Offset;
    uint64_t flag = recvFlag(0);
    bool needReload;
    int spins = 0;
    
    // 轮询直到标志匹配
    do {
      needReload = false;
      #pragma unroll
      for (int u=0; u<ELEMS_PER_THREAD; u+=2) {
        load128(ptr+u*WARP_SIZE, vr[u], vr[u+1]);
        needReload |= flagThread && (vr[u+1] != flag);  // 标志线程检查
      }
      needReload &= (0 == checkAbort(abort, 1, spins));
    } while (__any_sync(WARP_MASK, needReload));  // Warp内任意线程需要重载

    // 再次加载确保数据一致性
    #pragma unroll
    for (int u=0; u<ELEMS_PER_THREAD; u+=2)
      load128(ptr+u*WARP_SIZE, vr[u], vr[u+1]);
  }

  /********** 完成寄存器加载 **********/
  if (SRC) {
    loadRegsFinish(v);  // 洗牌操作
    if (SrcBuf == Input) {
      #pragma unroll
      for (int u=0; u<ELEMS_PER_THREAD; u+=2) {
        v[u] = applyPreOp(redOp, v[u]);
        if (!flagThread)
          v[u+1] = applyPreOp(redOp, v[u+1]);
      }
    }
  }

  /********** 接收剩余对等方数据 **********/
  if (RECV) {
    // 消费第一个接收
    #pragma unroll
    for (int u=0; u<ELEMS_PER_THREAD; u+=2) {
      v[u]   = SRC ? applyReduce(redOp, vr[u], v[u]) : vr[u];
      v[u+1] = SRC ? applyReduce(redOp, vr[u+1], v[u+1]) : vr[u+1];
    }

    // 处理其他接收方
    for (int i=1; i<MaxRecv && i<fan.nrecv(); i++) {
      uint64_t flag = recvFlag(i);
      uint64_t* ptr = recvPtr(i)+ll128Offset;
      bool needReload;
      int spins = 0;
      
      do {
        needReload = false;
        #pragma unroll
        for (int u=0; u<ELEMS_PER_THREAD; u+=2) {
          load128(ptr+u*WARP_SIZE, vr[u], vr[u+1]);
          needReload |= flagThread && (vr[u+1] != flag);
        }
        needReload &= (0 == checkAbort(abort, 1, spins));
      } while (__any_sync(WARP_MASK, needReload));

      #pragma unroll
      for (int u=0; u<ELEMS_PER_THREAD; u+=2)
        load128(ptr+u*WARP_SIZE, vr[u], vr[u+1]);

      #pragma unroll
      for (int u=0; u<ELEMS_PER_THREAD; u+=2) {
        v[u]   = applyReduce(redOp, vr[u], v[u]);
        v[u+1] = applyReduce(redOp, vr[u+1], v[u+1]);
      }
    }
  }

  /********** 后操作 **********/
  if (postOp) {
    #pragma unroll
    for (int u=0; u<ELEMS_PER_THREAD; u+=2) {
      v[u]   = applyPostOp(redOp, v[u]);
      v[u+1] = applyPostOp(redOp, v[u+1]);
    }
  }

  /********** 发送数据 **********/
  if (SEND) {
    for (int i=1; i<MaxSend && i<fan.nsend(); i++) {
      uint64_t flag = sendFlag(i);
      uint64_t* ptr = sendPtr(i)+ll128Offset;
      #pragma unroll
      for (int u=0; u<ELEMS_PER_THREAD; u+=2) {
        store128(ptr+u*WARP_SIZE, v[u], flagThread ? flag : v[u+1]);
      }
    }
    uint64_t flag = sendFlag(0);
    uint64_t* ptr = sendPtr(0)+ll128Offset;
    #pragma unroll
    for (int u=0; u<ELEMS_PER_THREAD; u+=2) {
      store128(ptr+u*WARP_SIZE, v[u], flagThread ? flag : v[u+1]);
    }
  }
}

4.5 Slice处理流程

// Slice大小计算
static constexpr int WireWordPerSlice = WARP_SIZE*NCCL_LL128_SHMEM_ELEMS_PER_THREAD;
// = 32 * 8 = 256个uint64_t = 2048字节

static constexpr int DataEltPerSlice = 
    (WireWordPerSlice - WireWordPerSlice/NCCL_LL128_LINEELEMS) * 
    (sizeof(uint64_t)/sizeof(T));
// 有效数据 = (256 - 256/16) * 8 / sizeof(T)
//          = (256 - 16) * 8 / sizeof(T)
//          = 240 * 8 / sizeof(T) 字节

template <int RECV, int SEND, int SrcBuf, int DstBuf>
__device__ __forceinline__ void GenericOp(
    intptr_t srcIx, intptr_t dstIx, int nelem, bool postOp) {
  
  T const *srcPtr = SrcBuf == -1 ? nullptr : userBufs[SrcBuf] + srcIx;
  T       *dstPtr = DstBuf == -1 ? nullptr : userBufs[DstBuf] + dstIx;
  int wireOffset = WireWordPerSlice*warp + 2*wid;
  const int nwarps = nthreads/WARP_SIZE;
  nelem = nelem < 0 ? 0 : nelem;

  if (SEND) waitSend(divUp(nelem, DataEltPerSlice)*WireWordPerSlice*sizeof(uint64_t));
  barrier();
  
  nelem -= DataEltPerSlice*warp;
  srcPtr += DataEltPerSlice*warp;
  dstPtr += DataEltPerSlice*warp;
  
  while (nelem > 0) {
    const int eltInSlice = min(nelem, DataEltPerSlice);
    uint64_t regs[NCCL_LL128_SHMEM_ELEMS_PER_THREAD];
    
    if (SRC) loadRegsBegin(regs, srcPtr, eltInSlice);
    recvReduceSendCopy<NCCL_LL128_SHMEM_ELEMS_PER_THREAD, RECV, SEND, SrcBuf, DstBuf>(
        regs, wireOffset, postOp);
    if (DST) storeRegs(dstPtr, regs, eltInSlice);

    wireOffset += WireWordPerSlice*nwarps;
    srcPtr += DataEltPerSlice*nwarps;
    dstPtr += DataEltPerSlice*nwarps;
    nelem -= DataEltPerSlice*nwarps;
  }

  barrier();
  if (SEND) for (int i=0; i < MaxSend; i++) sendStep[i] += 1;
  if (SEND) postSend();
  if (RECV) for (int i=0; i < MaxRecv; i++) recvStep[i] += 1;
  if (RECV) postRecv();
}

4.6 同步与内存一致性

// LL128特有的发送后同步
__device__ void postSend() {
  if (sendConnTailPtr) {
    #if __CUDA_ARCH__ >= 900
      __threadfence_system();  // SM90及以上使用系统级内存屏障
    #else
      __threadfence();         // 旧架构使用GPU级内存屏障
    #endif
    *sendConnTailPtr = sendConnTail += 1;
  }
}

// 接收后通知
__device__ void postRecv() {
  if (recvConnHeadPtr) 
    *recvConnHeadPtr = recvConnHead += 1;
}

5. Simple协议

5.1 核心设计理念

目标: 最大化带宽，适合大消息通信

关键特性:

  • 无标志位开销，100%有效带宽
  • 基于step计数器同步
  • 支持直接内存访问(Direct)
  • 支持NVLS和网络卸载
  • 灵活的Slice/Step配置

5.2 协议参数

template<int SlicePerChunk, int StepPerSlice, int Unroll, 
         int MultimemSrcs, int MultimemDsts>
struct ProtoSimple {
  static constexpr int Id = NCCL_PROTO_SIMPLE;
  static constexpr int SlicePerChunk = SlicePerChunk;  // 每Chunk的Slice数
  static constexpr int StepPerSlice = StepPerSlice;    // 每Slice的Step数
  static constexpr int Unroll = Unroll;                // 循环展开因子
  static constexpr int MultimemSrcs = MultimemSrcs;    // Multimem源数
  static constexpr int MultimemDsts = MultimemDsts;    // Multimem目标数
  
  __device__ static int calcBytePerStep() {
    return ncclShmem.comm.buffSizes[NCCL_PROTO_SIMPLE]/NCCL_STEPS;
  }
};

// 典型配置
// SlicePerChunk = 1-4
// StepPerSlice = 1-8
// Unroll = COLL_UNROLL (通常为4或8)

5.3 角色与标志位

// 线程角色定义
static constexpr int RoleInput       = 0x01;   // 处理输入
static constexpr int RoleOutput      = 0x02;   // 处理输出
static constexpr int RoleWaitRecv    = 0x04;   // 等待接收
static constexpr int RoleWaitSend    = 0x08;   // 等待发送
static constexpr int RolePostSend    = 0x10;   // 发送后通知
static constexpr int RolePostRecv    = 0x20;   // 接收后通知
static constexpr int Aborted         = 0x40;   // 中止标志
static constexpr int NetRegMode      = 0x80;   // 网络注册模式
static constexpr int ConnFifoEnabled = 0x100;  // 连接FIFO启用
static constexpr int DirectWrite     = 0x200;  // 直接写
static constexpr int DirectRead      = 0x400;  // 直接读
static constexpr int PatMode         = 0x800;  // PAT模式
static constexpr int NvlsMinPolling  = 0x1000; // NVLS最小轮询
static constexpr int NetDeviceUnpack = 0x2000; // 网络设备解包
static constexpr int AnyNetDeviceUnpack = 0x4000; // 任意网络设备解包

// 角色分配 (nrecv个接收方, nsend个发送方)
// 线程ID:  0 ... nrecv-1 | nrecv ... nrecv+nsend-1 | ... | tn-nsend ... tn-1 | tn-nsend-nrecv ... tn-nsend-1
// 角色:    WaitRecv      | WaitSend                | ... | PostSend          | PostRecv

5.4 Step计数器同步

// Step值加载 (支持NVLS multimem最小值规约)
inline __device__ uint64_t loadStepValue(uint64_t* ptr) {
  #if __CUDA_ARCH__ >= 900 && CUDART_VERSION >= 12010
  if (flags & NvlsMinPolling) {
    uint64_t ans;
    // NVLS: 原子最小值规约
    asm volatile("multimem.ld_reduce.acquire.sys.global.min.u64 %0, [%1];" 
        : "=l"(ans) 
        : "l"(cvta_to_global(ptr)) 
        : "memory");
    return ans;
  }
  #endif
  // 标准volatile加载
  return ld_volatile_global(ptr);
}

// 等待对等方 (接收或发送)
template <int DirectRecv, int DirectSend, int Recv, int Send, int Src, int Dst>
__device__ __forceinline__ void waitPeer(
    intptr_t srcIx, intptr_t dstIx, int offset, int nelts) {
  
  const bool isSendNotRecv = (Send && Recv) ? (flags & RoleWaitSend) : Send;
  
  if ((flags & (Recv * RoleWaitRecv)) || (flags & (Send * RoleWaitSend))) {
    int spins = 0;
    // 轮询step计数器
    while (connStepCache + (isSendNotRecv ? NCCL_STEPS : 0) < step + StepPerSlice) {
      connStepCache = loadStepValue(connStepPtr);
      if (checkAbort(flags, Aborted, spins)) break;
    }
  }

  // 更新连接FIFO
  if (flags & (Recv*RoleWaitRecv | Send*RoleWaitSend)) {
    if ((flags & ConnFifoEnabled) && (flags & (Send * RoleWaitSend)))
      connFifo[step%NCCL_STEPS].size = nelts*sizeof(T);

    void **ptrs = isSendNotRecv ? (ncclShmem.groups[group].dsts + Dst)
                                : (ncclShmem.groups[group].srcs + Src);
    
    // 设置指针 (根据Direct/FIFO/Buffer模式)
    if ((flags & NetRegMode) && ((!isSendNotRecv && DirectRecv) || 
                                  (isSendNotRecv && DirectSend))) {
      // 网络注册模式
      ptrs[index] = P2p ? NULL : userBuffer + offset;
    } else if ((flags & ConnFifoEnabled) && 
               connFifo[step%NCCL_STEPS].mode == NCCL_MODE_OFFSET) {
      // FIFO偏移模式
      ptrs[index] = connEltsFifo + loadInt(&connFifo[step%NCCL_STEPS].offset)/sizeof(T);
    } else if (isSendNotRecv && DirectSend) {
      // 直接发送
      if (flags & DirectWrite) {
        ptrs[index] = directBuff + dstIx + offset;
      } else if (flags & DirectRead) {
        ptrs[index] = nullptr;  // 空发送
      } else {
        ptrs[index] = connEltsFifo + (step%NCCL_STEPS)*connStepSize;
      }
    } else if (!isSendNotRecv && DirectRecv) {
      // 直接接收
      if (flags & DirectRead) {
        ptrs[index] = directBuff + srcIx + offset;
      } else if (flags & DirectWrite) {
        ptrs[index] = directBuff + dstIx + offset;
      } else {
        ptrs[index] = connEltsFifo + (step%NCCL_STEPS)*connStepSize;
      }
    } else {
      // 标准缓冲区
      ptrs[index] = connEltsFifo + (step%NCCL_STEPS)*connStepSize;
    }
    
    if (flags & NetDeviceUnpack) {
      ncclNetDeviceIncrementHead(group, index);
    }
    step += StepPerSlice;
  }
}

// 发送/接收后通知
template<int Recv, int Send>
inline __device__ void postPeer(bool dataStored) {
  if (flags & (Recv*RolePostRecv | Send*RolePostSend)) {
    step += StepPerSlice;
    if (Send && (flags & RolePostSend) && (dataStored||(flags&ConnFifoEnabled))) {
      fence_acq_rel_sys();  // 内存屏障确保数据可见性
    }
    st_relaxed_sys_global(connStepPtr, step);  // 更新step计数器
  }
}

5.5 通用操作实现

template <int DirectRecv1, int DirectSend1, int Recv, int Send, int SrcBuf, int DstBuf>
__device__ __forceinline__ void genericOp(
    intptr_t srcIx, intptr_t dstIx, int nelem, bool postOp) {
  
  constexpr int DirectRecv = 1 && Direct && DirectRecv1;
  constexpr int DirectSend = 1 && Direct && DirectSend1;
  constexpr int Src = SrcBuf != -1;
  constexpr int Dst = DstBuf != -1;

  nelem = nelem < 0 ? 0 : nelem;
  
  // 计算slice大小
  int sliceSize = stepSize*StepPerSlice;
  sliceSize = max(divUp(nelem, 16*SlicePerChunk)*16, sliceSize/32);
  int slice = 0;
  int offset = 0;

  if (tid < nworkers && offset < nelem && !isNetOffload) {
    // Worker循环处理非空slice
    #pragma unroll 1
    do {
      sliceSize = sliceSize < nelem-offset ? sliceSize : nelem-offset;
      
      // 设置源和目标指针
      if (tid == 0) {
        T* userInput = (T*)ncclShmem.groups[group].userInput;
        T* userOutput = (T*)ncclShmem.groups[group].userOutput;
        if (Src) ncclShmem.groups[group].srcs[0] = 
            (SrcBuf==Input ? userInput : userOutput) + srcIx + offset;
        if (Dst) ncclShmem.groups[group].dsts[0] = 
            (DstBuf==Input ? userInput : userOutput) + dstIx + offset;
      }
      
      waitPeer<DirectRecv, DirectSend, Recv, Send, Src, Dst>(
          srcIx, dstIx, offset, sliceSize);
      subBarrier();
      
      int workSize = ncclShmem.aborted ? 0 : sliceSize;
      
      // 网络设备解包
      if (flags & AnyNetDeviceUnpack) {
        ncclNetDeviceUnpack<Recv>(tid, tidInBlock, nworkers, group, 
            ncclShmem.groups[group].devicePlugin.unpack.unpackNetDeviceIndexMask, 
            Src, workSize);
        subBarrier();
      }

      // 特殊情况优化
      if (DirectRecv && ncclShmem.groups[group].srcs[0] == 
                        ncclShmem.groups[group].dsts[0] && 
          MultimemSrcs == 0 && MultimemDsts == 0 && !Src) {
        // 源和目标相同，跳过拷贝
        if (Send && Dst && ncclShmem.groups[group].srcs[0] != 
                           ncclShmem.groups[group].dsts[1]) {
          reduceCopy<Unroll, RedOp, T, 0, 1, 1, 0, 1, MaxSend, 0>
              (tid, nworkers, 0, nullptr, false,
               1, ncclShmem.groups[group].srcs,
               fan.nsend(), ncclShmem.groups[group].dsts+1,
               workSize);
        }
      } else if (DirectSend && !DirectRecv && SrcBuf != Input && 
                 ncclShmem.groups[group].dsts[Dst] == nullptr) {
        // 空发送 (broadcast in CollNet)
        reduceCopy<Unroll, RedOp, T, 0, 1, 1, 0, 1, 1, 0>
            (tid, nworkers, ncclShmem.redOpArgs[0], nullptr, postOp,
             Recv, ncclShmem.groups[group].srcs,
             Dst, ncclShmem.groups[group].dsts,
             workSize);
      } else if (ncclShmem.groups[group].srcs[0] && 
                 ncclShmem.groups[group].dsts[0]) {
        // 标准reduce-copy操作
        constexpr int PreOpSrcs = SrcBuf != Input ? 0 :
            DirectRecv*MaxRecv == NCCL_MAX_DIRECT_ARITY ? (1+NCCL_MAX_DIRECT_ARITY) : 1;
        
        reduceCopy<Unroll, RedOp, T,
            MultimemSrcs, Recv + Src, Recv * MaxRecv + Src,
            MultimemDsts, Send + Dst, Send * MaxSend + Dst, PreOpSrcs>
            (tid, nworkers, ncclShmem.redOpArgs[0], ncclShmem.redOpArgs, postOp,
             Recv * fan.nrecv() + Src, ncclShmem.groups[group].srcs,
             Send * fan.nsend() + Dst, ncclShmem.groups[group].dsts,
             workSize);
      } else {
        workSize = 0;
      }
      
      barrier();
      postPeer<Recv, Send>(0 < workSize);
      offset += sliceSize;
      slice += 1;
    } while (slice < SlicePerChunk && offset < nelem);
  }

  // 处理剩余空slice (非worker或空slice)
  #pragma unroll 1
  while (slice < SlicePerChunk) {
    sliceSize = sliceSize < nelem-offset ? sliceSize : nelem-offset;
    waitPeer<DirectRecv, DirectSend, Recv, Send, Src, Dst>(0, 0, 0, sliceSize);
    barrier();
    int workSize = ncclShmem.aborted ? 0 : sliceSize;
    postPeer<Recv, Send>(0 < workSize);
    offset += sliceSize;
    slice += 1;
  }
}

5.6 Scatter/Gather操作

template <int DirectRecv1, int DirectSend1, int Recv, int Send>
__device__ __forceinline__ void ScatterGatherOp(
    intptr_t inpIx, intptr_t outIx, ssize_t totalElem, int peerElem, 
    ssize_t peerOffset, int skip, int shift, bool postOp) {
  
  constexpr int DirectRecv = 1 && Direct && DirectRecv1;
  constexpr int DirectSend = 1 && Direct && DirectSend1;
  
  int offset = 0;
  int sliceSize = stepSize*StepPerSlice;
  int dataSize = max(DIVUP(peerElem, 16*SlicePerChunk)*16, sliceSize/32);

  #pragma unroll
  for (int slice=0; slice<SlicePerChunk; ++slice) {
    ssize_t realSize = max(0, min(dataSize, peerElem-offset));
    bool fenceNeeded = false;
    
    if (tid < nworkers) {
      if (Send) {
        // Scatter: 分发数据到多个对等方
        constexpr int PreOpSrcs = DirectSend ? 0 : 1;
        if (tid==0) 
          ncclShmem.groups[group].srcs[0] = 
              (T*)ncclShmem.groups[group].userInput + inpIx + offset;
        
        waitPeer<0, DirectSend, 0, 1, 1, 0>(0, inpIx, offset, realSize);
        subBarrier();
        
        #pragma unroll
        for (int j=0; j<fan.nsend(); j++) {
          int i = (j+shift)%fan.nsend();  // 轮转避免冲突
          ssize_t pOffset = i*peerOffset;
          if (skip >= 0 && i >= skip) pOffset += peerOffset;
          
          void* src0 = (T*)ncclShmem.groups[group].srcs[0] + pOffset;
          ssize_t realPeerSize = min(realSize, totalElem-pOffset);
          
          if (realPeerSize > 0 && ncclShmem.groups[group].dsts[i] != nullptr) {
            reduceCopy<Unroll, RedOp, T, 0,1,1, 0,1,1, PreOpSrcs>
                (tid, nworkers, ncclShmem.redOpArgs[0], ncclShmem.redOpArgs, 
                 false, 1, &src0, 1, ncclShmem.groups[group].dsts+i, 
                 realPeerSize);
            fenceNeeded |= true;
          }
        }
      } else if (Recv) {
        // Gather: 从多个对等方收集数据
        if (tid==0) 
          ncclShmem.groups[group].dsts[0] = 
              (T*)ncclShmem.groups[group].userOutput + outIx + offset;
        
        ssize_t pOffset = index*peerOffset;
        if (skip >= 0 && index >= skip) pOffset += peerOffset;
        
        waitPeer<DirectRecv, 0, 1, 0, 0, 1>(
            outIx+pOffset, outIx+pOffset, offset, realSize);
        subBarrier();
        
        #pragma unroll
        for (int j=0; j<fan.nrecv(); j++) {
          int i = (j+shift)%fan.nrecv();
          pOffset = i*peerOffset;
          if (skip >= 0 && i >= skip) pOffset += peerOffset;
          
          void* dst0 = (T*)ncclShmem.groups[group].dsts[0] + pOffset;
          ssize_t realPeerSize = min(realSize, totalElem-pOffset);
          
          if (DirectRecv && ncclShmem.groups[group].srcs[i] == dst0) 
            realPeerSize = 0;
          
          if (realPeerSize > 0) 
            reduceCopy<Unroll, RedOp, T, 0,1,1, 0,1,1, 0>
                (tid, nworkers, ncclShmem.redOpArgs[0], ncclShmem.redOpArgs, 
                 postOp, 1, ncclShmem.groups[group].srcs+i, 1, &dst0, 
                 realPeerSize);
        }
      }
    }
    
    fenceNeeded = barrierAny(fenceNeeded);
    postPeer<Recv, Send>(fenceNeeded);
    offset += realSize;
  }
}

5.7 直接内存访问

// 直接内存访问设置
__device__ void setDataPtrs(void const *inputBuf, void *outputBuf, 
                            uint64_t redOpArg, struct ncclDevWorkCollReg* work, 
                            uint8_t ipcReg, int peer) {
  if (tid==0) {
    ncclShmem.groups[group].userInput = (void*)inputBuf;
    ncclShmem.groups[group].userOutput = (void*)outputBuf;
    ncclShmem.redOpArgs[0] = redOpArg;
  }

  if (Direct && ipcReg) {
    bool recvProvider = (flags & RoleWaitRecv) && (flags & DirectWrite);
    bool sendAcceptor = (flags & RoleWaitSend) && (flags & DirectWrite);
    bool sendProvider = (flags & RoleWaitSend) && (flags & DirectRead);
    bool recvAcceptor = (flags & RoleWaitRecv) && (flags & DirectRead);
    
    // 接收提供者: 提供输出缓冲区供远端写入
    if (recvProvider) {
      int spins = 0;
      void* volatile* slot = ncclShmem.groups[group].recvConns[index]->ptrExchange;
      if (slot) {
        T* exchgPtr;
        directBuff = (T*)outputBuf;
        while (*slot != nullptr && !checkAbort(flags, Aborted, spins));
        
        if (P2p) {
          exchgPtr = (T*)outputBuf;
        } else {
          int localPeer = ncclShmem.comm.rankToLocalRank[peer];
          exchgPtr = (T*)(work->coll.recvbuffOffset + 
                          work->coll.recvbuffRmtAddrs[localPeer]);
        }
        *slot = reinterpret_cast<void*>(exchgPtr);
      }
    }
    
    // 发送接受者: 接收远端提供的缓冲区指针
    if (sendAcceptor) {
      int spins = 0;
      void* volatile* slot = ncclShmem.groups[group].sendConns[index]->ptrExchange;
      void* ptr;
      while (slot) {
        ptr = *slot;
        if (ptr != nullptr || checkAbort(flags, Aborted, spins)) break;
      }
      
      if (slot) {
        directBuff = reinterpret_cast<T*>(ptr);
        *slot = nullptr;
      } else {
        directBuff = (T*)work->dnOutputs[index];
      }
    }
    
    // 发送提供者: 提供输入/输出缓冲区供远端读取
    if (sendProvider) {
      int spins = 0;
      void* volatile* slot = ncclShmem.groups[group].sendConns[index]->ptrExchange;
      volatile uint64_t* argSlot0 = 
          ncclShmem.groups[group].sendConns[index]->redOpArgExchange;
      volatile uint64_t* argSlot1 = 
          ncclShmem.groups[group].sendConns[index]->redOpArgExchange + 1;
      
      if (slot && argSlot0 && argSlot1) {
        T* exchgPtr;
        while ((*slot != nullptr || *argSlot0 != 0 || *argSlot1 != 0) && 
               !checkAbort(flags, Aborted, spins));
        
        directBuff = MaxRecv == 0 ? (T*)inputBuf : (T*)outputBuf;
        
        if (P2p) {
          exchgPtr = directBuff;
        } else {
          int localPeer = ncclShmem.comm.rankToLocalRank[peer];
          if (MaxRecv == 0)
            exchgPtr = (T*)(work->coll.sendbuffOffset + 
                            work->coll.sendbuffRmtAddrs[localPeer]);
          else
            exchgPtr = (T*)(work->coll.recvbuffOffset + 
                            work->coll.recvbuffRmtAddrs[localPeer]);
        }
        
        // 交换预操作标量 (用于直接拉取)
        *argSlot0 = (uint64_t(1) << 32) | (uint32_t)redOpArg;
        *argSlot1 = (uint64_t(1) << 32) | (uint32_t)(redOpArg >> 32);
        *slot = reinterpret_cast<T*>(exchgPtr);
      }
    }
    
    // 接收接受者: 接收远端提供的缓冲区指针和标量
    if (recvAcceptor) {
      int spins = 0;
      void* volatile* slot = ncclShmem.groups[group].recvConns[index]->ptrExchange;
      volatile uint64_t* argSlot0 = 
          ncclShmem.groups[group].recvConns[index]->redOpArgExchange;
      volatile uint64_t* argSlot1 = 
          ncclShmem.groups[group].recvConns[index]->redOpArgExchange + 1;
      void* ptr;
      
      while (slot) {
        ptr = *slot;
        if (ptr != nullptr || checkAbort(flags, Aborted, spins)) break;
      }
      
      if (slot && argSlot0 && argSlot1) {
        directBuff = reinterpret_cast<T*>(ptr);
        
        if (MaxSend != 0) {  // reduce组而非gather组
          uint64_t arg0, arg1;
          while (true) {
            arg0 = *argSlot0;
            arg1 = *argSlot1;
            if ((arg0 != 0 && arg1 != 0) || checkAbort(flags, Aborted, spins)) 
              break;
          }
          ncclShmem.redOpArgs[1 + index] = 
              ((arg1 & 0xffffffff) << 32) | (arg0 & 0xffffffff);
        }
        *argSlot0 = 0; 
        *argSlot1 = 0;
        *slot = nullptr;
      } else {
        directBuff = (T*)work->dnInputs[index];
      }
    }
  }
}

    |
    └─ > 4MB ──────────────→ 带宽优先? ─┬─ 是 → Simple
                                         └─ 否 → LL128

特殊场景:
- 支持Direct访问? ──→ Simple
- 使用NVLS? ────────→ Simple  
- 网络卸载? ────────→ Simple
- P2P通信? ─────────→ Simple (带Direct)

6.4 实际应用场景

场景推荐协议原因
小batch训练LL梯度小，延迟敏感
大batch训练Simple梯度大，带宽优先
模型并行LL/LL128激活值中等大小
数据并行Simple梯度聚合，大消息
流水线并行LL激活值小，延迟关键
混合精度训练LL128/SimpleFP16梯度，中大消息
Embedding同步LL频繁小消息
AllGather参数Simple大参数，带宽敏感

7. 数据结构详解

7.1 连接信息结构

struct ncclConnInfo {
  // 通信缓冲区 (每个协议一个)
  char *buffs[NCCL_NUM_PROTOCOLS];  // LL, LL128, Simple
  void* mhandles[NCCL_NUM_PROTOCOLS]; // 内存句柄
  
  // 流水线同步指针
  uint64_t *tail;     // 接收侧本地，发送侧远程
  uint64_t *head;     // 发送侧本地，接收侧远程
  
  // 配置参数
  int flags;          // DirectWrite/DirectRead/NVLS等
  int shared;         // 缓冲区是否共享
  int stepSize;       // Simple协议步大小
  
  // 直接通信
  void **ptrExchange;          // 指针交换 (Direct模式)
  uint64_t* redOpArgExchange;  // PreOp标量交换 (Direct拉取)
  
  // GPU-Proxy通信
  struct ncclConnFifo* connFifo; // 连接FIFO
  
  // 状态
  uint64_t step;           // 当前步进
  uint64_t llLastCleaning; // LL最后清理步进
  
  // 网络设备
  ncclNetDeviceHandle_t netDeviceHandle;
};

7.2 LL FIFO行结构

union ncclLLFifoLine {
  struct {
    uint32_t data1;  // 4字节数据1
    uint32_t flag1;  // 4字节标志1
    uint32_t data2;  // 4字节数据2  
    uint32_t flag2;  // 4字节标志2
  };
  uint64_t v[2];     // 2个64位值
  int4 i4;           // 128位向量 (用于原子操作)
};

// 内存布局 (总16字节):
// 偏移0:  data1  (0-3字节)
// 偏移4:  flag1  (4-7字节)  
// 偏移8:  data2  (8-11字节)
// 偏移12: flag2  (12-15字节)

// 标志位计算:
// #define NCCL_LL_FLAG(a) ((uint32_t)(a))
// 每个step的标志 = step + 1

7.3 共享内存组结构

struct ncclShmemGroup {
  // 连接数组 (最多NCCL_MAX_ARITY个对等方)
  ncclConnInfo *recvConns[NCCL_MAX_ARITY];
  ncclConnInfo *sendConns[NCCL_MAX_ARITY];
  
  // 用户缓冲区
  void* userInput;   // 输入缓冲区指针
  void* userOutput;  // 输出缓冲区指针
  
  // 源和目标指针数组
  void* srcs[NCCL_MAX_ARITY+1];  // +1用于本地数据
  void* dsts[NCCL_MAX_ARITY+1];
  
  // 设备插件 (网络卸载等)
  union {
    unpackGroupShmem unpack;
  } devicePlugin;
  
  // 目标大小数组 (用于Simple协议FIFO)
  int32_t dstSizes[NCCL_MAX_ARITY+1];
};

8. 性能优化技术

8.1 内存访问优化

8.1.1 128位向量加载/存储

// op128.h: 128位原子操作
inline __device__ void load128(const uint64_t* ptr, uint64_t &v0, uint64_t &v1) {
  asm volatile("ld.volatile.global.v2.u64 {%0,%1}, [%2];"
      : "=l"(v0), "=l"(v1) : "l"(ptr) : "memory");
}

inline __device__ void store128(uint64_t* ptr, uint64_t v0, uint64_t v1) {
  asm volatile("st.volatile.global.v2.u64 [%2], {%0,%1};"
      :: "l"(v0), "l"(v1), "l"(ptr) : "memory");
}

// 共享内存128位操作
inline __device__ void loadShmem128(uint64_t* shmemAsmPtr, uint64_t &v0, uint64_t &v1) {
  asm volatile("ld.volatile.shared.v2.u64 {%0,%1}, [%2];"
      : "=l"(v0), "=l"(v1) : "l"(shmemAsmPtr) : "memory");
}

inline __device__ void storeShmem128(uint64_t* shmemAsmPtr, uint64_t v0, uint64_t v1) {
  asm volatile("st.volatile.shared.v2.u64 [%2], {%0,%1};"
      :: "l"(v0), "l"(v1), "l"(shmemAsmPtr) : "memory");
}

8.1.2 Multimem操作 (SM90+)

#if __CUDA_ARCH__ >= 900 && CUDART_VERSION >= 12010
template<>
__device__ __forceinline__ void multimem_st_global<16>(uintptr_t addr, BytePack<16> val) {
  // Multimem存储: 多目标原子写入
  asm volatile("multimem.st.global.v4.f32 [%0], {%1,%2,%3,%4};"
    :: "l"(addr), "r"(val.u32[0]), "r"(val.u32[1]), 
       "r"(val.u32[2]), "r"(val.u32[3])
    : "memory");
}

// Multimem最小值规约加载 (NVLS)
inline __device__ uint64_t loadStepValue(uint64_t* ptr) {
  if (flags & NvlsMinPolling) {
    uint64_t ans;
    asm volatile("multimem.ld_reduce.acquire.sys.global.min.u64 %0, [%1];" 
        : "=l"(ans) : "l"(cvta_to_global(ptr)) : "memory");
    return ans;
  }
  return ld_volatile_global(ptr);
}
#endif

8.2 内存屏障与一致性

// 获取-释放系统级屏障
__device__ __forceinline__ void fence_acq_rel_sys() {
  #if __CUDA_ARCH__ >= 700
    asm volatile("fence.acq_rel.sys;" ::: "memory");
  #else
    asm volatile("membar.sys;" ::: "memory");
  #endif
}

// GPU级屏障
__device__ __forceinline__ void fence_acq_rel_gpu() {
  #if __CUDA_ARCH__ >= 700
    asm volatile("fence.acq_rel.gpu;" ::: "memory");
  #else
    asm volatile("membar.gl;" ::: "memory");
  #endif
}

// 释放语义存储
__device__ __forceinline__ void st_release_sys_global(uint64_t *ptr, uint64_t val) {
  #if __CUDA_ARCH__ >= 700
    asm volatile("st.release.sys.global.u64 [%0], %1;" 
        :: "l"(cvta_to_global(ptr)), "l"(val) : "memory");
  #else
    asm volatile("membar.sys; st.volatile.global.u64 [%0], %1;" 
        :: "l"(cvta_to_global(ptr)), "l"(val) : "memory");
  #endif
}

// 获取语义加载  
__device__ __forceinline__ uint64_t ld_acquire_sys_global(uint64_t *ptr) {
  uint64_t ans;
  #if __CUDA_ARCH__ >= 700
    asm volatile("ld.acquire.sys.global.u64 %0, [%1];" 
        : "=l"(ans) : "l"(cvta_to_global(ptr)) : "memory");
  #else
    asm volatile("ld.volatile.sys.global.u64 %0, [%1]; membar.gl;" 
        : "=l"(ans) : "l"(cvta_to_global(ptr)) : "memory");
  #endif
  return ans;
}

8.3 Warp级同步

// Warp内同步
__syncwarp();  // 同步warp内所有线程

// Warp任意线程投票
bool needReload = false;
// ... 设置needReload ...
while (__any_sync(WARP_MASK, needReload)) {  // 任意线程为真则继续
  // ...
}

// Barrier同步 (命名barrier)
inline __device__ void barrier_sync(int name, int nThreads) {
  asm volatile("barrier.sync.aligned %0, %1;" 
      :: "r"(name), "r"(nThreads) : "memory");
}

// Barrier规约 (OR)
inline __device__ bool barrier_red_or(bool vote, int name, int nThreads) {
  int ans;
  asm volatile("{ .reg .pred p;"
      "  setp.ne.s32 p, %1, 0;"
      "  barrier.red.or.pred p, %2, %3, p; "
      "  selp.s32 %0, 1, 0, p; }"
      : "=r"(ans) : "r"((int)vote), "r"(name), "r"(nThreads) : "memory");
  return bool(ans);
}

for (int u=0; u<NCCL_LL128_SHMEM_ELEMS_PER_THREAD; u+=2) {

8.5 共享内存使用

// 每warp共享内存暂存
__device__ inline void* ncclScratchForWarp(int warp) {
  return (char*)ncclShmemPerWarp + warp*ncclShmemScratchWarpSize();
}

// LL128不对齐数据加载
if(reinterpret_cast<uintptr_t>(src)%16 != 0) {
  // 通过共享内存暂存对齐
  uint64_t *shm8 = shmemCvtPtr((uint64_t*)ncclScratchForWarp(warpInBlock));
  
  // 加载到共享内存
  for(int g=0; g < WordPerThread/2; g++)
    if((g*WARP_SIZE + wid)*16 < misalignment + eltN*sizeof(T))
      load128(src8 + 2*(g*WARP_SIZE + wid), regs[2*g+0], regs[2*g+1]);
  
  for(int g=0; g < WordPerThread/2; g++)
    storeShmem128(shm8 + 2*(g*WARP_SIZE + wid), regs[2*g+0], regs[2*g+1]);

  __syncwarp();

  // 从共享内存加载到寄存器
  T *shm = (T*)shm8 + misalignment/sizeof(T);
  for(int g=0; g < WordPerThread/2; g++) {
    int ix = g*WARP_SIZE - 4*(g/2) + wid - (g%2)*(wid/8);
    if(!flagThread || g%2==0) {
      if(ix*EltPer16B < eltN)
        loadShmemMisaligned128(shm + ix*EltPer16B, regs[2*g+0], regs[2*g+1]);
    }
  }
}

8.6 分支消除

// Simple: 分离worker和non-worker循环
if (tid < nworkers && offset < nelem && !isNetOffload) {
  // Worker-only循环: 处理非空slice
  #pragma unroll 1
  do {
    // ... worker操作 ...
  } while (slice < SlicePerChunk && offset < nelem);
}

// Non-worker循环: 处理空slice
#pragma unroll 1
while (slice < SlicePerChunk) {
  waitPeer<DirectRecv, DirectSend, Recv, Send, Src, Dst>(0, 0, 0, sliceSize);
  barrier();
  postPeer<Recv, Send>(0);
  slice += 1;
}

// 性能提升:
// perf_orig = 2*numslices (每个slice都判断两次)
// perf_new = 2+numslices  (仅判断一次+循环尾部)

9. 代码实现细节

9.1 Primitives构造与析构

// LL协议构造函数
__device__ Primitives(
    const int tid, const int nthreads, int const *recvPeers, int const *sendPeers,
    void const *inputBuf, void *outputBuf, uint64_t redOpArg, uint8_t group=0,
    uint8_t connIndexRecv=0, uint8_t connIndexSend=0, 
    struct ncclDevWorkColl* e = nullptr,
    bool ipcReg = false, bool netReg = false, int stepSize_ = 0
  ):
  redOp(redOpArg),
  tid(tid), nthreads(nthreads), wid(tid%WARP_SIZE), group(group),
  stepLines(ncclShmem.comm.buffSizes[NCCL_PROTO_LL]/NCCL_STEPS/sizeof(ncclLLFifoLine)) {
  
  auto *channel = &ncclShmem.channel;
  int nrecv=0, nsend=0;
  
  // 加载接收连接
  while (nrecv < Fan::MaxRecv && recvPeers[nrecv] >= 0) {
    loadRecvConn(&channel->peers[recvPeers[nrecv]]->recv[connIndexRecv], nrecv);
    nrecv++;
  }
  
  // 加载发送连接
  while (nsend < MaxSend && sendPeers[nsend] >= 0) {
    loadSendConn(&channel->peers[sendPeers[nsend]]->send[connIndexSend], nsend);
    nsend++;
  }
  
  this->fan = Fan(nrecv, nsend);
  loadRecvSync();
  loadSendSync();
  setDataPtrs(inputBuf, outputBuf);
}

// LL协议析构函数
__device__ ~Primitives() {
  // 保存步进供下次操作使用
  if (tid >= nthreads-WARP_SIZE && wid < fan.nrecv())
    recvConn->step = recvConnHead;
  if (tid < fan.nsend())
    sendConn->step = sendConnHead;
  // 确保所有步进已写回
  barrier();
}

9.2 连接加载

// LL: 加载接收连接
__device__ __forceinline__ void loadRecvConn(struct ncclConnInfo* conn, int i) {
  recvBuff[i] = (union ncclLLFifoLine*)conn->buffs[NCCL_PROTO_LL];
  recvStep[i] = conn->step;
  if (wid == i) recvConn = conn;
}

__device__ __forceinline__ void loadRecvSync() {
  if (tid >= nthreads-WARP_SIZE && wid < fan.nrecv()) {
    recvConnHeadPtr = recvConn->head;
    recvConnHead = recvConn->step;
  }
}

// Simple: 加载接收连接 (支持Direct/NetReg等)
__device__ __forceinline__ void loadRecvConn(
    ncclDevChannelPeer *peer, int connIndex, uint32_t direct, 
    int ipcRegFlag, int netRegFlag) {
  
  conn = &peer->recv[connIndex];
  
  // 网络设备卸载
  if (conn->netDeviceHandle.netDeviceType == NCCL_NET_DEVICE_UNPACK) {
    netDeviceHandle = conn->netDeviceHandle.handle;
    ncclNetDeviceUnpackSetup(netDeviceHandle, group, index);
    flags |= NetDeviceUnpack;
  }
  
  step = conn->step;
  step = roundUp(step, SlicePerChunk*StepPerSlice);  // 向上对齐
  
  if (flags & RolePostRecv) {
    connStepPtr = conn->head;
    *connStepPtr = step;  // 返回credit
  }
  
  if (flags & RoleWaitRecv) {
    ncclShmem.groups[group].recvConns[index] = conn;
    flags |= (conn->flags & NCCL_NVLS_MIN_POLL) ? NvlsMinPolling : 0;
    connStepPtr = conn->tail;
    connStepCache = loadStepValue(connStepPtr);
    connStepSize = conn->stepSize/sizeof(T);
    connEltsFifo = (T*)conn->buffs[NCCL_PROTO_SIMPLE];
    
    if (conn->connFifo != nullptr) {
      flags |= ConnFifoEnabled;
      connFifo = conn->connFifo;
    }
    
    // Direct模式设置
    if (Direct) {
      if (ipcRegFlag) {
        if (conn->flags & (NCCL_P2P_READ | NCCL_P2P_WRITE)) {
          if (P2p) {
            flags |= conn->flags & NCCL_P2P_WRITE ? DirectWrite : DirectRead;
          } else if (connIndex == 1 && direct) {
            flags |= DirectRead;
          } else {
            flags |= direct & NCCL_P2P_READ ? DirectRead : DirectWrite;
          }
        } else if ((conn->flags & NCCL_NVLS_MIN_POLL)) {
          flags |= DirectRead;  // NVLS direct
        }
      }
      
      if (netRegFlag) {
        if (conn->flags & NCCL_DIRECT_NIC) {
          flags |= NetRegMode;
          connFifo[step % NCCL_STEPS].size = 0;
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

}

// Scatter/Gather
__device__ void scatter(intptr_t inpIx, ssize_t totalElem, int peerElem, ssize_t peerOffset, int skip, int shift) {
  ScatterGatherOp<0, 0, 0, 1>(inpIx, -1, totalElem, peerElem, peerOffset, skip, shift, false);
}

__device__ void directScatter(intptr_t inpIx, ssize_t totalElem, int peerElem, ssize_t peerOffset, int skip, int shift) {
  ScatterGatherOp<0, 1, 0, 1>(inpIx, -1, totalElem, peerElem, peerOffset, skip, shift, false);
}

__device__ void gather(intptr_t outIx, ssize_t totalElem, int peerElem, ssize_t peerOffset, int skip, int shift, bool postOp=false) {
  ScatterGatherOp<0, 0, 1, 0>(-1, outIx, totalElem, peerElem, peerOffset, skip, shift, postOp);
}

__device__ void directGather(intptr_t outIx, ssize_t totalElem, int peerElem, ssize_t peerOffset, int skip, int shift) {
  ScatterGatherOp<1, 0, 1, 0>(-1, outIx, totalElem, peerElem, peerOffset, skip, shift, false);
}

9.4 中止检查

__device__ inline int checkAbort(int &abortCache, const int abortValue, int &spins) {
  if (abortCache & abortValue) return 1;  // 已中止
  
  if (++spins < NCCL_SPINS_BEFORE_CHECK_ABORT) return 0;  // 未达检查阈值
  
  spins = 0;
  int abort = *ncclShmem.comm.abortFlag;  // 检查全局中止标志
  if (abort) {
    ncclShmem.aborted = abort;
    abortCache |= abortValue;
  }
  return abort;
}

// 使用示例 (LL readLL)
int spins = 0;
do {
  asm volatile("ld.volatile.global.v4.u32 {%0,%1,%2,%3}, [%4];" 
      : "=r"(data1), "=r"(flag1), "=r"(data2), "=r"(flag2) 
      : "l"(&src->i4));
  if (checkAbort(abort, 1, spins)) break;  // 定期检查中止
} while ((flag1 != flag) || (flag2 != flag));

10. 使用场景与选择策略

10.1 消息大小决策矩阵

消息大小延迟敏感带宽敏感推荐协议理由
<1KB是-LL最低延迟，标志位轮询
1KB-64KB是否LL延迟优先
1KB-64KB否是LL128带宽更高 (93.75%)
64KB-256KB是-LL128平衡延迟和带宽
64KB-256KB-是LL128接近Simple带宽
256KB-1MB--LL128最佳选择
1MB-4MB-是LL128/Simple带宽接近
>4MB-是Simple100%带宽利用

10.2 硬件特性决策

是否支持GPUDirect RDMA?
    |
    ├─ 是 ──→ 是否为P2P通信? ─┬─ 是 → Simple + Direct
    |                         └─ 否 → 根据消息大小选择
    |
    └─ 否 ──→ 根据消息大小选择

是否使用NVLS?
    |
    └─ 是 ──→ Simple (必须)

网络是否支持卸载?
    |
    └─ 是 ──→ Simple (NetDeviceUnpack)

GPU架构?
    |
    ├─ SM90+ ──→ Simple (Multimem优化)
    └─ <SM90 ──→ 根据消息大小选择

10.3 通信模式决策

通信模式特征推荐协议配置建议
AllReduce双向通信、规约操作LL128/Simple根据数据量
Broadcast单向扇出LL/Simple小用LL，大用Simple
Reduce多对一规约LL128/Simple中大消息用Simple
AllGather数据收集Simple通常大数据量
ReduceScatter规约后分散Simple通常大数据量
SendRecv (P2P)点对点Simple+Direct支持GPUDirect

10.4 深度学习训练场景

10.4.1 数据并行

# PyTorch DDP示例
import torch.distributed as dist

# 小batch (batch_size <= 32)
# 梯度较小 (<1MB per layer)
# 推荐: NCCL_PROTO=LL or NCCL_PROTO=LL128
NCCL_PROTO=LL python -m torch.distributed.launch train.py

# 大batch (batch_size >= 128)  
# 梯度较大 (>4MB per layer)
# 推荐: NCCL_PROTO=Simple
NCCL_PROTO=Simple python -m torch.distributed.launch train.py

# 自动选择 (NCCL默认)
python -m torch.distributed.launch train.py

10.4.2 模型并行

# Megatron-LM张量并行
# 特点: 频繁小激活值通信
# 推荐: LL (最低延迟)
NCCL_PROTO=LL python pretrain_gpt.py \
    --tensor-model-parallel-size 8 \
    --pipeline-model-parallel-size 1

# 流水线并行
# 特点: 激活值中等，对延迟敏感
# 推荐: LL128
NCCL_PROTO=LL128 python pretrain_gpt.py \
    --tensor-model-parallel-size 1 \
    --pipeline-model-parallel-size 8

10.4.3 混合精度训练

# FP16梯度 (2字节/元素)
# 梯度大小 = 模型参数量 * 2
# GPT-3 175B: 350GB梯度
# 推荐: Simple
NCCL_PROTO=Simple python train_fp16.py

# BF16梯度 (2字节/元素)
# 类似FP16
NCCL_PROTO=Simple python train_bf16.py

10.5 环境变量配置

# 强制指定协议

# 自动选择 (默认)

# Simple协议参数

# LL/LL128缓冲区大小

export NCCL_LL128_BUFFSIZE=1048576  # LL128: 1MB

# NVLS (H100+)

10.6 性能调优检查清单

10.6.1 硬件配置

  • [ ] NVLink拓扑最优 (nvidia-smi topo -m)
  • [ ] PCIe带宽充足 (Gen4 x16推荐)
  • [ ] 网络带宽匹配GPU带宽 (100Gbps+ for H100)
  • [ ] GPUDirect RDMA已启用
  • [ ] CPU亲和性正确设置

10.6.2 NCCL配置

  • [ ] 协议选择合理 (根据消息大小)
  • [ ] 通道数优化 (NCCL_MIN/MAX_NCHANNELS)
  • [ ] 线程数适配 (NCCL_NTHREADS)
  • [ ] 缓冲区大小合理 (NCCL_BUFFSIZE)
  • [ ] NVLS已启用 (H100+)

10.6.3 应用层优化

  • [ ] 梯度合并/分桶 (DDP bucket_cap_mb)
  • [ ] 通信与计算重叠
  • [ ] Batch大小优化
  • [ ] 混合精度训练 (FP16/BF16)

10.7 故障排查

10.7.1 性能问题

# 1. 检查协议选择
NCCL_DEBUG=INFO ./app 2>&1 | grep "Using"
# 输出: [INFO] Using PROTO_SIMPLE

# 2. 检查通道数
NCCL_DEBUG=INFO ./app 2>&1 | grep "channels"
# 输出: [INFO] 16 channels

# 3. 性能分析
export NCCL_DEBUG=INFO
export NCCL_DEBUG_SUBSYS=GRAPH,TUNING
./app

# 4. NCCL测试
git clone https://github.com/NVIDIA/nccl-tests.git
cd nccl-tests
make
./build/all_reduce_perf -b 8 -e 128M -f 2 -g 8

10.7.2 常见问题

问题可能原因解决方案
带宽低协议选择不当大消息用Simple
延迟高缓冲区太大减小NCCL_BUFFSIZE
卡死网络故障/中止检查NCCL_DEBUG
OOM缓冲区太大减小BUFFSIZE或通道数
性能不稳定CPU throttling检查CPU频率

总结

NCCL通过三种协议 (LL、LL128、Simple) 实现了延迟和带宽的全方位优化：

LL协议：最低延迟，适合小消息高频通信

  • 标志位轮询同步
  • 50%有效带宽
  • 支持不对齐访问

LL128协议：平衡性能，适合中等消息

  • 标志线程机制
  • 93.75%有效带宽
  • Warp级优化

Simple协议：最高带宽，适合大消息

  • Step计数器同步
  • 100%有效带宽
  • 支持Direct/NVLS/网络卸载

关键技术：

  • 128位向量原子操作
  • Warp级并行与同步
  • 共享内存优化
  • 内存屏障与一致性
  • 直接内存访问
  • Multimem操作 (SM90+)

选择策略：

  • <256KB: LL
  • 256KB-4MB: LL128
  • >4MB: Simple
  • P2P/NVLS: Simple + Direct

通过理解协议实现机制和优化技术，可以针对不同硬件和应用场景进行深度调优，最大化分布式训练性能。
